intro: Swida monbeigii, also known as Dabishibe or Chinese Cornelian Cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the family Cornaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and rheumatism, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
